query: light leak film burn red orange flare expired film
message: sub:film_artifacts/light_leak — anti_aesthetic — color casts, lens flare, expired film color shifts

response.objective_caption: A close-up image of overlapping curved and geometric forms in saturated green, yellow-orange, red, and deep burgundy tones. A dark semicircular area in the lower right meets streaked, mottled surfaces with reflective highlights, producing layered boundaries between contrasting color zones.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: An abstract photograph featuring aggressively clashing acidic greens, oranges, and reds in toxic disharmony across degraded, pitted surfaces suggesting chemical corrosion. A dark semicircular shape intersects fluid-like membranes and corroded textures that dissolve into pure color and form, creating a non-representational meditation on entropy and chromatic aggression.
